services.title: Software Development & Custom Solutions
services.description: I design and develop software tailored specifically to your needs. From the initial idea to the final deployment, I create applications that streamline your processes, improve efficiency, and help your business grow.

services.title: IT Operations & System Management
services.description: I take care of your IT systems so they run smoothly every day. I monitor networks, manage servers, optimize performance, and help prevent issues before they happen.

services.title: Software Support & Maintenance
services.description: I provide ongoing support to keep your software working at its best: bug fixes, feature updates, operational assistance, and reliable maintenance for business-critical tools.
